message:
fix: tab-mode reset detection and cross-tab sync in UnifiedDashboard (#9388)

isCustomized now compares tabCards against config.tabs defaults when
hasTabs is true, so the Reset button appears for customized tab-mode
dashboards. A storage event listener syncs card state across browser
tabs to prevent overwrites.

Fixes #9383, Fixes #9384

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
